articles.title: Will it happen now? Galo back better season for loan striker
articles.description: After failing to establish himself in an initial spell with Atlético Mineiro, João Marcelo was loaned to Al Ahli of the United Arab Emirates at the start of this year. However, the 21-year-old forward did not get the expected playing time in his first months in the Middle East. He made nine appearances — two as a starter — and scored two goals. João Marcelo and Galo are hoping for more opportunities in Portuguese coach Paulo Sousa’s team, with the upcoming preseason offering a chance for that. He is on loan at Al Ahli until the end of this year and will report to the club in the United Arab Emirates on the 28th. Atlético believes the forward could stand out, either with a view to a permanent transfer or to have a "more ready" player for 2027. He has made 17 appearances for Galo and scored two goals. Photo: Pedro Souza / Atlético This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇧🇷 here.
